indication: OPDIVO (nivolumab), in combination with ipilimumab, is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with microsatellite instability-high (MSI-H) or mismatch repair deficient (dMMR) metastatic colorectal cancer after prior fluoropyrimidine-based therapy in combination with oxaliplatin or irinotecan.
description: Health Canada approved nivolumab, in combination with ipilimumab, for the treatment of adult patients with microsatellite instability-high (MSI-H) or mismatch repair deficient (dMMR) metastatic colorectal caner after prior fluoropyrimidine-based therapy in combination with oxaliplatin or irinotecan.
